---
name: Burn Index submission
about: Anonymous efficiency metrics from `agentburn --submit` (auto-prefilled)
title: "burn-index: submission"
labels: burn-index
---

This issue carries an anonymous Burn Index payload generated by
`agentburn --submit`. It contains efficiency ratios and a coarse spend band
only — no session titles, paths, or content.

If you are filing this by hand, run `agentburn --submit` and paste the
```json block it prints below.
